use_cases: Landing pages for crypto trading platforms and DeFi products
SaaS landing pages for AI-powered financial tools
Product hero sections for fintech startups
Landing pages for investment and trading platforms
ai_summary: A dark-themed hero section for a crypto trading SaaS platform featuring AI-powered branding, with subtle purple gradient accents and entrance animations via Framer Motion. The component includes a promotional badge, headline with highlighted text, descriptive copy, and CTA buttons in a clean, modern layout optimized for fintech and crypto landing pages.
